post_deploy: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates gnupg git && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
npm install -g openclaw@latest && command -v openclaw && openclaw --version 2>&1 | tail -1

setsid nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & ready=0; for i in $(seq 1 30); do if curl -sS -o /dev/null --max-time 2 http://127.0.0.1:18789/__openclaw__/canvas/ 2>/dev/null; then echo "gateway first response after ${i}s"; ready=1; break; fi; sleep 1; done; if [ "$ready" = "0" ]; then echo 'gateway never bound 18789 within 30s'; echo '--- /var/log/openclaw.log ---'; cat /var/log/openclaw.log 2>&1 | tail -80; echo '--- ps ---'; ps -ef 2>&1 | grep -E 'openclaw|node' | grep -v grep | head -10; exit 1; fi; sleep 5; if ! curl -sS -o /dev/null --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:18789/__openclaw__/canvas/ 2>/dev/null; then echo 'gateway died within 5s of first response'; echo '--- /var/log/openclaw.log ---'; cat /var/log/openclaw.log 2>&1 | tail -80; echo '--- ps ---'; ps -ef 2>&1 | grep -E 'openclaw|node' | grep -v grep | head -10; exit 1; fi; echo 'openclaw gateway stable'
